# SSH 同步拉取 (remote → local)
# 替换 YOUR_HOST / YOUR_PASSWORD 为实际值后运行
#
# 递归拉取目录
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "sync", "direction": "pull", "local_path": "./logs", "remote_path": "/opt/app/logs", "recursive": true}
aitk SSH_

# 拉取并删除本地多余文件
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "sync", "direction": "pull", "local_path": "./logs", "remote_path": "/opt/app/logs", "recursive": true, "delete": true}
aitk SSH_
